ai_summary: GPT Infraprojects Limited has informed stock exchanges of its compliance by dispatching physical letters to shareholders without registered email addresses, directing them to the company website for the FY2025-26 Annual Report and the notice for the 46th virtual Annual General Meeting (AGM) on August 8, 2026. This action ensures all shareholders receive essential information and facilitates e-voting, while also prompting them to update KYC details and register email addresses for future digital communications. No material impacts or red flags are identified, as this is a routine regulatory compliance update.
